buildCommand: cd pixpro-frontend && npm ci && mkdir -p src/environments && echo "export const environment = { production: true, apiUrl: '${API_URL}', notificationsWsUrl: '${NOTIFICATIONS_WS_URL}', auth0: { domain: '${AUTH0_DOMAIN}', clientId: '${AUTH0_CLIENT_ID}', audience: '${AUTH0_AUDIENCE}', redirectUri: '${AUTH0_REDIRECT_URI}' } };" > src/environments/environment.production.ts && echo "export const environment = { production: false, apiUrl: '${API_URL}', notificationsWsUrl: '${NOTIFICATIONS_WS_URL}', auth0: { domain: '${AUTH0_DOMAIN}', clientId: '${AUTH0_CLIENT_ID}', audience: '${AUTH0_AUDIENCE}', redirectUri: '${AUTH0_REDIRECT_URI}' } };" > src/environments/environment.ts && npm run build -- --configuration production
